title: Fix OTP Login to correctly redirect admin (9422018674) to Admin Panel

requirements.text: On the OTP login page, after a user successfully verifies their OTP, check if the logged-in mobile number is '9422018674'. If it matches, redirect to the admin panel route (/admin). For all other users, redirect to the user dashboard (/dashboard). Ensure this redirect logic is clearly implemented and reliable.
acceptanceCriteria: When mobile number 9422018674 successfully verifies OTP, the app redirects to the /admin route
When any other mobile number successfully verifies OTP, the app redirects to the /dashboard route
The login page shows the mobile number input field and 'Send OTP' button as the first step
After OTP is sent, a 6-digit OTP input field and 'Verify & Login' button are displayed
Failed OTP verification shows an error message and does not redirect

requirements.text: Ensure the admin panel page (/admin route) enforces access control: only the user authenticated with mobile number '9422018674' can view it. Any other authenticated user who navigates to /admin should be redirected to /dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin while logged in as a non-admin user redirects to /dashboard
Navigating to /admin while logged in as 9422018674 shows the admin panel
Navigating to /admin while not logged in redirects to /login

requirements.text: In the backend, ensure the admin account with mobile number '9422018674' is pre-seeded or auto-created on first OTP request if not already registered, so admin can always log in via OTP without needing to go through the registration flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Calling sendOtp with mobile '9422018674' always succeeds even if no registered profile exists
The admin account with mobile '9422018674' exists in the backend user store after first OTP request
The generated OTP for '9422018674' can be retrieved or is accessible for login verification

constraints: Admin mobile number is exactly '9422018674' — do not change or parameterize this value
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor
nonGoals: Adding new admin features beyond what is already implemented
Changing the visual theme or layout of existing pages
Implementing SMS delivery for OTP — OTP remains simulated/stored in state
